nodes.label: Tic-Tac-Tore Home Hub Screen
nodes.description: A dark-themed home hub dashboard screen for a foosball or sports game app called 'Tic-Tac-Tore'. It features a prominent green 'New Match' card with a soccer ball watermark. It includes navigation cards for 'Teams & Rules', 'Played Matches', 'Statistics', and 'Tournaments'. A quick queue button 'I Want to Play' is displayed above a 'GAME POOLS' section listing active matches like 'Lunch Break 2v2', 'Weekend Open', and 'Evening 1v1 Open' with corresponding Join/Register actions.
